PublicRemarks: Welcome to 432 Addison Avenue, a rare Haddon Township home where timeless charm and thoughtful updates come together in all the right ways. From the moment you arrive, it feels special. A blooming pink dogwood, bluestone pavers, and a striking stone exterior create a warm, inviting first impression, while a newer roof, private driveway, and single-car garage bring everyday practicality. Step inside through the glass front door into a light-filled living room with a bay window and gas fireplace, the kind of space that naturally becomes the heart of the home. The first floor offers incredible flexibility with two bedrooms and a beautifully remodeled full bath featuring designer hexagonal tile flooring and a penny tile surround. Whether you need guest space, a home office, or the ease of single-level living, this layout adapts effortlessly. At the back of the home, the kitchen blends character and function with built-in cabinetry, glass-front uppers, a pantry, and newer Samsung appliances. It opens into a bright dining area where oversized windows frame views of the backyard and fill the space with natural light. This is where meals were shared, conversations lingered, and everyday moments quietly became lasting memories. Step outside and you’ll find a backyard that truly extends the living space. Bluestone pavers, a stone patio, and mature landscaping create a private, peaceful setting perfect for summer barbecues, evenings by the fire pit, and a few competitive rounds of cornhole. The finished basement offers even more versatility with a spacious entertainment area, a separate private room ideal for a gym or office, a large laundry space, and plenty of storage. Upstairs, a landing provides the perfect nook for work or reading, leading to the primary suite with generous closet space and a beautifully remodeled bathroom with a walk-in shower. Meticulously maintained throughout, the home includes a hot water heater from 2023, HVAC from 2014, and an upgraded 150-amp electrical panel. Every update has been made with care, and it shows. But what truly makes 432 Addison Avenue special is the life that has unfolded here. From quiet mornings and work-from-home days to holiday traditions that filled every room, from growing families to loyal four-legged companions, this is a home that has been deeply loved. And now, it’s ready to welcome its next chapter.

Perfectly positioned on the Merchantville border, this showcase home offers the advantage of Pennsauken taxes while delivering an elevated lifestyle defined by thoughtful upgrades and impeccable design. From the moment you arrive, the home’s Curb Appeal makes a lasting impression.  Professionally landscaped grounds, a custom brick-paved walkway, hardscaped steps, classic awnings, and charming flower boxes create a picture perfect welcome on a generous .30-acre lot. Inside, a gracious Entry foyer sets the tone with a leaded glass transom, custom wood molding, and a double coat closet with upgraded hardware.  Rich hardwood flooring flows throughout the main level, enhancing the home’s warmth and sophistication. The formal Living Room features a Gas Fireplace, recessed lighting, and custom radiator covers, while the Dining Room offers an elegant space for entertaining with dimmable sconces, chair rail box molding, and millwork that continues seamlessly into the kitchen. The Beautifully Remodeled Kitchen is both stylish and functional, complete with an island, Granite and solid surface countertops, a striking subway tile backsplash, built-in display shelving, pantry, trough lighting over cabinets and premium appliances including a Liebherr refrigerator/freezer and Kenmore Elite range, dishwasher, and microwave. A heated, enclosed Sunroom featuring original detailed windows enhanced with energy-efficient plexiglass provides a serene, year-round retreat.  A convenient Half Bath completes the main level. Upstairs, 3 Bedrooms (originally four, thoughtfully reconfigured for added space) retain their historic character with some original crystal doorknobs and vintage details. The primary bedroom offers a generous closet and a cozy sitting area. The fully remodeled hall Bathroom is a luxurious escape, showcasing marble flooring, subway tile walls and tub surround, a dual shower head, pocket door, linen closet, and dedicated wall heater. Additional highlights include a walk-up Attic that is floored, insulated, and equipped with an attic fan, as well as a Full Basement with abundant storage, laundry access, sump pump, and upgraded electrical including flood and holiday lighting ports. Outdoor living is equally impressive, featuring a spacious composite Deck overlooking a beautifully landscaped yard with a pond (included as-is) and a natural privacy border of arborvitae.  An Irrigation system services both lawn and gardens for easy maintenance. The detached two-car Garage includes electric and attic storage, complemented by an additional shed. Modern comforts abound with two-zone high-velocity Central Air, baseboard hot water and radiator heat, an updated electrical panel (with knob-and-tube removed), and a hardwired security system. This home also includes kitchen appliances, washer and dryer, light fixtures, window treatments (including Hunter Douglas shades installed in 2020), window candle timer system, birdhouses, swing set, and a one-year HSA Home Warranty for added peace of mind. A rare opportunity to own a truly distinguished home where classic architecture meets modern convenience - this is living at its finest!

PublicRemarks: Timeless character, fleeting opportunity. Welcome to 20 Doncaster, an East Side gem ready for its next chapter. Dressed in dark-on-dark tones, the quintessential New England palette plays perfectly with the charm of this saltbox-style Sturbridge model. You'll notice ample frontage, beautiful perennials, and speckled sunlight through the tree canopy. Step inside and into a generous foyer. This first impression area gives glimpses of what surrounds, and accommodates plenty of furniture and organizational pieces. Up two steps to the main level, a large living room is flanked by extra long windows to the front, with sunlight beaming in. This versatile space can be approached as a formal & elegant entertaining room, or a comfortable everyday place for relaxation. A wide passage to the formal dining room connects the defined spaces and preserves visual continuity. Imagine festive occasions with friends & family gathered around a large dining table. Alternatively, envision kitchen expansion into this space if you seek a luxury renovation down the road. The lovely kitchen has room enough for an eat-in or a center island, and has plenty of room for storage as well as prep and service. Don't miss the large pantry, perfect for putting everything away! A half wall with spindles separates the kitchen from a heart-of-home family room. This cozy space features a focal fireplace with a brick half-wall and original full-span mantle, as well as beams overhead. A mid-century vibe in here has been preserved and is ready to be cherished! Sliders to the back yard yield a picture-perfect view of the woodsy grounds. Just down the hall, an incredible flex space is technically a 5th bedroom, but is often taken as an office, playroom, or other custom space... endless possibilities! Also on this level: a spacious powder room at the center, a first-floor laundry room (with exterior door), plus interior access to the large 2 car garage. Upstairs, four bedrooms and two full baths mean room enough for all. A large primary suite features two closets plus a generously sized en suite bathroom with walk-in shower. Three bright and cheery additional bedrooms all have nice closet space, and share a large main hall bath with a tub / shower combo and dual vanity. Attic and eaves are available for storage. On the lowest level, a large unfinished basement is an untapped opportunity. Keep it as it is for amazing storage, or finish it for wonderful additional space for living & play. Outside, a combination of natural ground cover and rocks is low maintenence and lovely; it feels like an escape into nature. Plenty of space to the sides for a playset, hot tub, or any recreation of your choosing. The home has original hardwoods throughout the majority, and you can feel the pride in ownership that has been a tradition for decades. The Wexford East neighborhood is a non-through loop, offering quiet streets and community connectedness without the hustle and bustle. uilt by renowned builder Scarborough, these homes have stood the test of time and are sought after throughout multiple developments. In this central East Side location, everything is at your fingertips. Faulous schools - Stockton Elementary, Beck Middle, and CHOICE of East or West for high school (with East just blocks away). Public PreK rolling out. Minutes to 295, 70 & 73, PATCO station, and NJ Turnpike. Amazing restaurants & shopping in all directions, plus parks & trails, playgrounds, recreation, athletic fields, JCC community center + gym, and Cherry Hill's famous Springdale Farm. Walkable to several houses of worship. Big box shopping and all suburban conveniences are nearby, Seize the opportunity of the moment and make Doncaster yours! Virtual tour Friday - no in-person guests are admitted during the video-only tour. In-person Open House Sunday 4/19, all are welcome.

PublicRemarks: Welcome to 50 Cameo Drive, a truly exceptional custom residence nestled in the sought-after Siena neighborhood of Cherry Hill. Expertly crafted by builder Pond & Spitz in collaboration with a private architect, this one-of-a-kind home is offered by its original owners and reflects a level of quality, design, and thoughtful detail that is rarely found. From the moment you arrive, the home’s presence is undeniable—combining timeless elegance with comfortable luxury. Step inside to a welcoming foyer adorned with rich hardwood flooring, setting the tone for the beautifully designed spaces that follow. The main level offers a seamless flow, featuring a formal dining room with hardwood floors, a spacious living room, and a warm, inviting family room anchored by a gas fireplace and soaring cathedral ceilings. At the heart of the home is a chef’s kitchen designed to impress, complete with Sub-Zero refrigeration, double ovens, granite countertops, ceramic tile flooring, oversized pantry, and abundant space for both everyday living and entertaining. Just beyond, a sun-drenched sunroom with ceramic tile floors provides a peaceful retreat, while the expansive main-level bar creates the perfect setting for hosting gatherings. A private home office on the main floor adds both convenience and versatility. Upstairs, you’ll find four generously sized bedrooms along with a flexible bonus room—ideal for a home office, nanny suite, or additional living space. The luxurious primary suite offers a serene escape, highlighted by its own gas fireplace.  A true sanctuary, the primary suite is enhanced by a spa-caliber bath featuring a striking soaking tub, a sophisticated walk-in shower, and a thoughtfully curated design that evokes the feel of a private retreat. Two secondary bedrooms feature en-suite bathrooms, including one with dual access to the hallway, providing both privacy and functionality. In total, the home offers four full bathrooms and one half bath, thoughtfully designed for comfort and ease. The fully finished, walk-out basement is truly expansive and offers incredible additional living space. It includes a gym area, multiple storage spaces, a bonus room with closet, an additional office, a full bathroom, and a dedicated wine closet—perfect for both everyday living and entertaining on a grand scale. Step outside to your private backyard oasis, where a stunning two-tier deck overlooks peaceful wooded surroundings. The property has been thoughtfully enhanced with a custom retaining wall to create a flat, usable yard, complemented by a tranquil fish pond—offering both beauty and serenity. Additional highlights include a three-car garage, two gas fireplaces, and the unmistakable craftsmanship of a home built with intention and care. 50 Cameo Drive is more than a home—it is a rare opportunity to own a custom-built residence where space, design, and setting come together in perfect harmony.

PublicRemarks: Rarely does a property of this caliber come to market. Positioned as a coveted end unit within an impeccably maintained planned community — caddy corner from the clubhouse — this architecturally refined two-story townhouse represents the pinnacle of elevated, low-maintenance living. Freshly painted throughout, the residence offers a seamless fusion of thoughtful design, high-end finishes, and an abundance of natural light that must be experienced firsthand. Soaring 9-foot ceilings on all levels set an immediate tone of grandeur. The dramatic entry foyer announces the home's intention: a soaring staircase bathed in cascading sunlight from oversized statement windows create a gallery-worthy first impression. Rich hardwood floors flow throughout the main level, guiding you effortlessly through an intelligently conceived open floor plan. A dedicated home office — thoughtfully separated from the primary living areas — offers a refined retreat for focused work. The living room anchors the home with a dramatic custom floor to ceiling fireplace ceramic enclosure with natural wood mantle gas fireplace, flanked by shuttered windows. The circular flow transitions naturally into the dining area, where a sculptural designer chandelier commands the room above a generous table for eight. Slider doors open to a private landing, presenting an ideal canvas for an al fresco patio. The kitchen is nothing short of a chef's showcase. Crisp white shaker cabinetry, complemented by quartz countertops, a subway tile backsplash, and a premium suite of stainless appliances including a double wall oven, gas range, and built-in microwave. The oversized island — with double sink and counter seating — serves equally as a gathering space and a culinary workstation. Full-extension drawers and soft-close hardware speak to the thoughtful design. A powder room completes the first floor. Ascend the dramatic staircase — illuminated from above by arched windows and crowned with a statement chandelier on the upper landing — to discover three generously proportioned bedroom suites, each appointed with premium carpet and shutters. Two en suite bedrooms offer private baths and large walk-in closets. The primary suite is a sanctuary unto itself: a tray ceiling treatment adds architectural distinction, while the spa-caliber bath delivers a large walk-in glass shower, deep soaking tub, private water closet, and double-sink vanity. Two walk-in closets and a dedicated linen closet complete this private retreat. The semi-finished basement — with soaring ceilings and recessed lighting — offers extraordinary flexibility. Two generous storage closets provide abundant organization, while a roughed-in, capped plumbing bay stands ready to be transformed into a half bath, seamlessly completing additional finished living space. The mechanical suite includes a high-efficiency dual-zone HVAC system with smart thermostats, forced air heating and cooling, gas hot water heater, 200-amp electrical service, and a French drain with sump — engineered for worry-free ownership. PublicRemarks: There are homes—and then there are homes that make a statement with intention. 43 Southwood Drive is one of them. Partially designed by Mark Stumer of Mojo Stumer—the award-winning New York–based firm known for its luxury residences throughout the Hamptons and Manhattan—this nearly one-acre estate in Cherry Hill’s coveted Wilderness Run neighborhood represents something increasingly rare: a home where every detail has been thoughtfully considered. Offering approximately 4,800 square feet, 4 bedrooms, and 5 baths, the home is both expansive and beautifully proportioned. From the moment you enter, a grand floating curved staircase rises with quiet elegance—its form as sculptural as it is functional. A secondary spiral staircase leads to a private library, reflecting a design that thoughtfully balances beauty and livability. The main level effortlessly blends warmth and sophistication. The family room features soaring ceilings, skylights, a fireplace, wet bar, and custom built-ins, while multiple living spaces provide exceptional flexibility. Walls of Pella windows transform natural light into a defining architectural feature. The kitchen is both refined and purposeful—featuring Sub-Zero, Wolf, Bosch, and JennAir appliances, an oversized island with gas cooking and seating, custom cabinetry with pull-outs, refrigerator drawers, a prep sink, and a spacious pantry. A skylit eat-in area opens seamlessly to a Trex deck, creating a natural connection between indoor and outdoor living. The formal dining room is a true showpiece. Handcrafted Italian mirrored panels reveal a thoughtfully designed built-in feature wall with three distinct sections: a sophisticated bar complete with wine storage and glass shelving, a dedicated area for serving pieces and display, and additional cabinetry with shelving and larger drawers for functional storage—all accentuated by dramatic backlighting to elevate every gathering into an unforgettable experience. Upstairs, the primary suite offers a true sense of retreat, complete with custom built-ins and a spa-inspired bath featuring a soaking tub, expansive shower, and a distinctive glass block wall that welcomes soft natural light while preserving privacy. Additional bedrooms are generously sized and thoughtfully designed, complemented by well-appointed baths including a Jack-and-Jill layout, a dedicated office, and a flexible bonus or gym space. A cedar closet and above-garage storage add both function and convenience. Outdoors, a resurfaced gunite pool and spa with diving board, expansive paver patio, Trex deck, and pool house create a private resort-style setting—perfect for both relaxation and entertaining. Located within the highly regarded Cherry Hill school system and one of the area’s most prestigious neighborhoods, 43 Southwood Drive is more than a home—it is a carefully crafted architectural experience. Homes of this caliber are exceptionally rare. In Wilderness Run, this is a truly special opportunity.

PublicRemarks: **Best & Final Offers Due by Wednesday - April 15th at 12pm ** Delightful in every way! Proudly presenting 1514 Hillside Drive: a Downs Farm charmer that checks all the boxes. Classic brick paired with white columns and a spacious front yard set the tone from the curb. A covered front porch beckons you at the entry and a sun-drenched foyer welcomes you inside.  This ample entryway is a great way to start - room for storage on both sides and opportunity to organize shoes and coats, while also saying hello to guests when they visit.  Upstairs, you'll find an oversized living room with loads of natural light beaming through a wall of windows, making it a great space to gather with friends or relax and unwind with a peaceful view of the beautiful neighborhood block. The versatility of this space will have you dreaming up your custom setup! The living room opens up to the dining room which conveniently connects to the kitchen. With stainless steel appliances, accent backsplash, updated hardware, and a hip vibe, you will love cooking in this space! Notice back yard views out the pretty double window. Additional counter space along the half-wall of the kitchen allows the chef to prepare & serve meals with ease, while also being able to interact with guests. The open flow of our three spaces is ideal for not just everyday live but also hosting parties or holiday dinners. Down the hall, you'll find a spacious full bathroom dressed in neutral tones, and with a convenient bath / shower combo. Two nicely sized bedrooms share this bathroom, and both bedrooms offer good closet space and nice bright natural illumination. A primary suite sits in the corner of the home, and has an oversized closet and its very own en suite bathroom! How wonderful to have a space all of your own. The lower level of this home presents opportunities galore!  Step downstairs and find a family room that's large enough for all to gather. The space can e divvied up into several uses, as these homeowners have done. Work, play, and relax all in this catchall space. Sunlight shines through multiple windows on both sides... It does not feel like lower-level living! Also on this floor, a powder room for added convenience and a sizable bonus room, which currently functions as a fourth bedroom; however, could also be used as an office, playroom or a gym.  It's a great flex space!  Behind this room, sits an oversized storage area with mechanicals and a washer and dryer.  This room could easily be sectioned off to create another bonus space.  To head back upstairs, utilize the back staircase.  It's a shortcut from the lower level family room straight to the kitchen: a great party trick!  You can also stop halfway to get to the garage or walk outback where the magic awaits.  A large, newly added patio serves as a great additional place for entertaining or relaxing under the stars.  The patio connects to a large, fully fenced-in yard that backs up to the woods. Private and beautiful throughout the seasons - just look at the beautiful green buds filling in! There is also a path behind a neighbor's home that takes you directly to the Downs Farm Swim Club - a fabulous place to spend your summers and build community year after year.  The Downs Farm neighborhood is also conveniently located near popular shopping centers and major highways like 295, which connects you to Routes 70, 73, 38 and the NJ Turnpike.  Access to amazing schools: Horace Mann Elementary, Rosa Middle School and CHOICE of East or West High School.  It's a fabulous opportunity to be a part of a wonderful community. East side life & plenty of space at an amazing price... say yes to this address!

Welcome to this charming 3-bedroom, 2.5-bath home featuring a perfect blend of comfort and convenience. AgentRemarks: This Waverly model has been expanded with an additional 374 square feet added (10 x14 + 9 x 26) with permits. Voorhees Twp requires a survey in order to obtain c/o. It is the buyer's/ buyer's agent responsibility to deliver survey township prior to closing. Sellers will be replacing 11 windows in the front. Notes from Sellers: windows will be ordered very soon.  That could take 6-8 weeks to arrive.  They can be installed right away.  The buyer will be able to choose between retaining the stucco finish (which will require some repair due to the removal and replacement of the windows) OR removing all of the stucco and replacing with siding.  I don’t have the price yet for siding, but it may cost a bit more.  They buyer would have to pay the additional amount.  They would be able to select the color and design elements like shutters.
PublicRemarks: Welcome to 7 Maison Place, an extraordinary 4,165-square-foot residence in the heart of Voorhees, proudly offered by its original owners and showcasing the only expanded Waverly model in the entire community. Thoughtfully designed, impeccably maintained, and rich in architectural detail, this exceptional home offers 4 bedrooms, 3.5 bathrooms, and outstanding indoor-outdoor living. From the moment you arrive, the home’s beautiful landscaping, strong curb appeal, and side-turned two-car garage with driveway set the tone. Step inside the dramatic two-story foyer, where elegance and warmth immediately welcome you. To the left, a gracious living room provides the perfect space for conversation or quiet retreat; to the right, a spacious formal dining room with hardwood flooring is ideal for hosting memorable gatherings. The heart of the home is the show-stopping, expanded chef’s kitchen—a true centerpiece and magazine-featured space. Designed for both beauty and function, the kitchen features a large working island, Wolf six-burner range with griddle, Sub-Zero refrigerator, double ovens, high-end appliances, under-cabinet lighting, built-in desk, wine refrigerator, coffee bar, and a beautifully appointed butler’s pantry. This kitchen was thoughtfully created for serious cooking and effortless entertaining. The open-concept layout flows seamlessly into the impressive family room, highlighted by a soaring two-story ceiling and gas fireplace, creating an inviting and dramatic gathering space. The family room also features a custom built-in entertainment center and bookcases, blending style with functionality. A private home office with French doors, custom wood desk, and built-in bookcases offers an ideal work-from-home solution. Additional highlights include both a front and back staircase, enhancing everyday convenience and flow. For an elevated entertainment experience, the family room and finished basement are equipped with high-fidelity 5.1 surround sound systems with built-in ceiling and wall speakers. Additionally, the main floor and patio feature built-in high-fidelity speakers powered by a Sonos multi-zone amplifier system, allowing seamless indoor-outdoor enjoyment. Upstairs, the serene primary suite is a true retreat, featuring two large walk-in closets and a spa-inspired bath with Italian marble, rain shower, double vanity, and heated towel rack. Three additional bedrooms are generously sized and share a well-appointed full bath. The finished basement further expands the home’s living space and includes a full bath with shower, gym with professional flooring and mirrors, bar, abundant storage, and integrated surround sound—perfect for recreation, fitness, or hosting guests. Outdoors, enjoy your own private backyard oasis. Fully fenced and beautifully landscaped, the yard features a two-tier paver patio, fire pit, hot tub, and integrated audio—ideal for entertaining or relaxing under the stars. Located within a highly rated school district and close to shopping, dining, major roadways, nearby cities, and the Jersey Shore, this exceptional home offers the perfect balance of luxury, comfort, and convenience. Schedule your private tour today and experience everything 7 Maison Place has to offer.

PublicRemarks: This sale includes both the fully renovated single-family home and the separate detached commercial building together as one package on the same deed. The home and commercial building cannot be sold separately. Rare opportunity to own a unique combined residential/commercial property at 1 Maple Ave, Haddon Township, NJ 08108, prominently positioned at the point of Maple Ave and Locust Ave fronting Haddon Ave. The offering includes a 3-story single-family home, a separate free-standing one-story corner commercial building, a detached one-car garage with electric, professionally improved grounds, and an exceptionally functional wraparound driveway with access from both Maple Ave and Locust Ave. The property is commercially zoned and the current configuration consists of a single-family residence together with a detached commercial building, grandfathered into the current R2 zone. The asking price reflects the value and utility of the entire combined package, including the renovated home, detached commercial/flex building, garage, parking capacity, lot layout, and prime visibility. This is a package sale only. The main residence was fully renovated in 2024 down to the studs and offers a rare combination of character, scale, and major system upgrades. The home features 4 bedrooms, 1.5 bathrooms, 9-foot ceilings, an enclosed front porch, gourmet kitchen, stainless steel appliances, quartz countertops, custom wood range hood, under-cabinet lighting, mud room, second-floor laundry, and an unfinished basement for storage. The third-floor bedroom offers excellent flexibility and could serve as a private primary suite, bonus living area, office, guest space, kids playroom. Major improvements completed during the 2024 renovation include, but not limited to,  new HVAC, new plumbing, new electric, new drywall, new insulation, new lighting, new roof, new siding, new windows, new gutters, new capping, new flooring, new concrete work, French drains, sump pump, and 200-amp electrical service, full irrigation The exterior has also been extensively improved with professional landscaping and hardscaping designed for privacy, function, and curb appeal. Features include full irrigation, landscape lighting, all new sod, large 8-foot privacy trees, Belgian block landscape border, a new Trex deck, and a detached one-car garage with power. A major standout feature of the property is the wraparound driveway configuration, which provides outstanding access, convenience, and parking flexibility. The Maple Ave side, located at the front of the house, offers a single-lane driveway with room for up to 6 vehicles. The Locust Ave side, located toward the rear/side of the property, provides a side-by-side driveway with room for approximately 4 vehicles. With the ability to enter from either side and pull completely through, the layout eliminates the typical inconvenience of tight backing movements and limited driveway access. The detached corner commercial building is one of the property’s most compelling assets. Positioned in a prime high-visibility location directly facing Haddon Ave, the building offers strong presence and flexibility for a future owner. It has been substantially improved with interior and exterior waterproofing systems, new roof, new windows, new doors, and new framing. The building also benefits from 10-foot ceilings, adding to the openness and usability of the space. It currently includes an open-concept private office layout, storage space, a half bathroom, and a small basement area at the rear of the building. Separate electric, water, and sewer service are already in place. The detached building is ready for a buyer to complete based on their vision and intended use. Potential uses may include a private office, studio, creative workspace, showroom, home-based business headquarters, wellness or fitness concept, professional services space, or additional storage/support space, subject to township approval.

PublicRemarks: 110 Avondale Ave., Haddonfield, NJ, offered at $1,999,000. This exceptional new construction home offers over 4,200 square feet of beautifully finished living space across four levels in the highly desirable Haddonfield School District. Texas White Ash flooring spans throughout the home, complemented by a high-end trim package, inverted tray ceilings, designer lighting, and a 72-inch linear gas fireplace. A continuous oak staircase with metal balusters runs from the basement to the upper floor. The home is fully wired with Cat6 networking, features smart Wi-Fi thermostats on each level, dual high-efficiency HVAC systems with three zones, a 200-amp electrical service, new water, sewer, and gas lines, and a 200k BTU tankless water heater with recirculating loop for instant hot water. The primary suite offers a spacious 15’ x 18’ bedroom, custom walk-in closet with LED lighting, and a spa-inspired bath featuring a freestanding soaking tub, arched porcelain-tiled walk-in shower with Moen Wi-Fi smart controller and body sprayers, frameless glass enclosure, and dual quartz vanity with designer finishes. Additional bedrooms include generous closets and designer bathrooms, including an oversized en-suite. The finished lower level provides a custom bar with gold-finished cabinetry, full-size counter-depth refrigerator, luxury carpeting, marble-floored powder room, and ample storage. The third floor offers a large loft area with a full bath and additional flexible space, plus approximately 700 square feet of unfinished attic space with 8-foot ceilings. This is a rare opportunity to own a premier new construction home in one of South Jersey’s most sought-after communities.

This home offers the rare combination of brand-new construction, premium finishes, expansive land, and a prime location. Don’t miss your chance to own a truly special property! Upon entry, a dramatic foyer welcomes you with warm hardwood flooring, soaring ceilings, modern paint tones, and an abundance of natural light. A large coat closet and conveniently located powder room sit just off the entryway. Hardwood floors continue seamlessly into the formal living and dining rooms, creating an elegant flow throughout the main level. The eat-in kitchen is both bright and functional, offering stainless steel appliances, granite countertops, ample cabinetry, and generous storage. Two sliding glass doors open to a spacious balcony overlooking the tranquil wooded backdrop. The adjoining family room is ideal for gatherings, featuring a stunning stone wood-burning fireplace and a mahogany wet bar. An additional sliding door provides direct access to the balcony from this space as well. Upstairs, you’ll find four well-sized bedrooms with plentiful closet space and three beautifully updated bathrooms. Each bathroom showcases thoughtful modern design, high-end finishes, and custom details that balance luxury with practicality. The primary suite serves as a private sanctuary, highlighted by a tray ceiling, walk-in closet, and a spa-inspired ensuite bathroom complete with a soaking tub, walk-in shower, and private balcony access—perfect for enjoying your morning coffee. A conveniently located laundry room completes the second level. The fully finished basement offers an incredible bonus living area you’ll absolutely love. This space features a large tavern-style wet bar with wine refrigerator, abundant storage, natural light from windows, and direct exterior access to the fenced backyard—ideal for entertaining or relaxing. Ideally located, this home is just minutes from shopping, dining—including the popular Chophouse—grocery stores, schools, hospitals, and essential services. With easy access to Philadelphia, the Jersey Shore, and New York City, this location truly offers the best of all worlds. There is so much to love about this home, Schedule your private showing today.

A sagging porch juts out from the entrance, its once-sturdy beams now brittle and warped. Rusted metal railings groan under the slightest touch, their black paint mostly eroded to reveal patches of orange corrosion. The second floor shows similar signs of decay. Upon entering, you'll be captivated by the dramatic grand foyer with soaring vaulted ceilings and a stunning winding staircase.  Wander to the left to find a formal living room/library, formal dining room and an additional flex/tv/game/kids room with a fireplace, half bath and glass doors leading out to a flagstone patio with plenty of seating. Wander to the right to find a spacious office with French doors accompanied conveniently by a half bath right next door.  Continue down the hall to the spacious two-story family room with fireplace, where natural light pours in through an abundance of windows. The family room opens to one of three beautifully manicured patios, providing the ideal setting for entertaining or enjoying serene outdoor living. Walk through the family room past the back second staircase to one of the five bedrooms.  Keep walking down the hall to the 3 car heated garage and a door leading to the third outside space including a stone patio, grassy side yard and playground.  Right in the center of the home, you’ll find an expansive kitchen open to the family room on one end and an adjoining butler’s pantry with wet bar and wine cooler connected directly to the formal dining room featuring crown molding, chair rail, recessed lighting and a large storage closet.  The kitchen showcases raised-panel 42” maple cabinetry, 3 pantry closets, stainless steel appliances, a 5-burner gas range, oversized island with breakfast bar and separate casual dining space for plenty of seating.  Take one of the two staircases upstairs, to the luxurious primary suite featuring a sitting room, fireplace, two walk-in closets with windows, and a spa-inspired bath with dual separated vanities, soaking tub, and spacious shower. Walk down the hall to another bedroom with an en-suite bathroom. A laundry room and two more bedrooms with a full bathroom connecting them round out this floor.  Additional highlights include a full unfinished basement with 9-foot ceilings, Hardwood floors flow throughout first floor and plenty of closet space.  Two of the heating systems are brand new, the third only 3 years old.  Two of the air conditioning units are approx 5 years old.  The overall property comes with 7.34 acres.  The home itself is located on a 330 x 330 sq ft, 2.49 acre lot.
